protected.noSupabase: Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env.local — catalog and orders require Supabase.

auth.noEnv: Copy .env.example → .env and add your Supabase keys.
auth.terms: By tapping “Get code”, you agree to the terms of service.
auth.demoUiHint: Catalog and orders need API keys — use this to click through the UI. Set VITE_AUTH_MOCK=true in .env (dev only).
auth.devLoginHint: In Supabase → Authentication → Users, create a user with email demo@optbirja.local and password demo123456 (or set your own in .env), Email provider.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.emptyDbHint: Check your Supabase connection and seed data, then refresh.

cart.title: Cart
cart.productMissing: This product is no longer in the catalog
cart.checkoutBlocked: Fix your cart: unavailable items or stock limits

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.shippingHint: For logistics and alerts — optional in MVP but recommended.
checkout.emptyHint: Add items to your cart or open the catalog to pick products.
checkout.bffQuoteBanner: Pricing server is unavailable — totals are estimated locally and may differ from the final order.

orderSuccess.title: Order placed
orderSuccess.verifyFailed: We couldn’t find this ID in your orders. Open Profile — if the order is listed, you’re all set.

profile.ordersError: Could not load orders. Check your connection and try again.
profile.noOrdersYet: No orders yet — browse the catalog.
profile.themeDarkHint: Saved in this browser. Landing and app switch together.

showcase.title: Showcase category examples
showcase.subtitle: Catalog filters: by category or search. Below are visual cases with photos and deep links.
showcase.hintCategory: Open the catalog with the category filter applied.
showcase.hintSearch: Open the catalog with a search query to mimic assortment grouping.

profile.addressesFormHint: Stored only in this browser on this device and prefilled at checkout. Server sync can be added later.
profile.paymentPageHint: Cards and bank links — in a future release.

home.noSupabase: Connect Supabase per README — catalog is empty.

realtime.disconnected: Live price stream is down. Catalog may be stale.

landing.liveBadge: Prices and stock update without refreshing the page
landing.heroTitle: Wholesale without spreadsheet ping-pong: what you see is what you order
landing.heroSubtitle: Flow: pick SKU and quantity → checkout runs a stock check and locks the line price. Buyers track statuses; suppliers see orders that include their items in the same app.
landing.benefit1Title: Price desk changed the file — the storefront already did
landing.benefit1Body: Mini-case: a discount or list price update hits product cards and cart math automatically. Less “let me confirm with the warehouse”.
landing.benefit2Title: Checkout that won’t surprise you on stock
landing.benefit2Body: Case: the order won’t clear if quantity isn’t there; line prices are fixed at validation time — fewer “you quoted me another total” disputes.
landing.benefit3Title: Each role sees its own work
landing.benefit3Body: Buyer — cart and delivery. Supplier — incoming orders for their SKUs. Status handoffs and alerts follow the chain (demo uses stubs ready for real integrations).
landing.fomoBody: Buyers notice low stock and strong deals. Suppliers get new orders with their lines without a separate mail merge. Everyone reads the same live data.
landing.fomoBullet1: Payment and shipment steps advance in order; in the demo stack some steps are simulated automatically.
landing.fomoBullet2: Category plus wholesale tiers (more units → lower unit price) sit on the product card — no hidden tables.
landing.categoriesHint: After sign-in open the catalog: search by name, filter by category and price — no call to sales just to check availability.
landing.partnerSubtitle: Leave an email and one line: company, purchase volume, region. This form is demo-only — nothing is sent server-side, you only get an on-screen confirmation.
landing.formDisclaimer: By submitting you agree we may contact you about partnership. In demo mode no email is delivered.

productDetail.buyOneClickHint: Add to cart and go to checkout

productCard.topHint: Deep discount — grab wholesale while it lasts
productCard.wholesaleHint: Higher volume means lower unit price

supplier.title: Supplier
supplier.subtitle: Your products and stock
supplier.roleHint: The supplier role is set in Supabase (profiles table). Example SQL:
supplier.roleHintSql: update profiles set role = 'supplier' where id = '…';
supplier.name: Name
supplier.noOrdersYet: No orders for your SKUs yet
supplier.ordersRealtimeHint: List refreshes via Supabase Realtime on status changes.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Metrics, catalog, suppliers, broadcasts, promotions
admin.needRole: Requires admin role in the profiles table.
admin.statsUnavailable: Stats unavailable. Apply admin_platform migration in Supabase.
admin.broadcastHint: Push/email/Telegram delivery runs via worker or Edge Function on notification_outbox.
admin.ordersPanelHint: Statuses & tracking; with BFF+service role the demo runs paid → shipped → completed.

bff.unavailable: API server is unavailable. Start the BFF (npm run dev:bff) or try again later.
bff.quoteFallback: Totals are calculated locally; the pricing server did not respond.

rpc.permission: You don’t have permission for this action.

submit.insufficient: Not enough stock. Reduce quantity or refresh the cart.
submit.auth: Session expired. Please sign in again.
submit.db: Could not save the order. Try again.
submit.generic: Could not place the order. Try later.
submit.emptyCart: Cart is empty. Add items and try again.
submit.missingProduct: Product unavailable. Refresh catalog and cart.
